consumer_notes: This export is derived only from verified_rules.json.
Review, rejected, and not_used rules are not executable constraints.
Map consumers should display review_blockers as warnings, not apply them as zoning logic.

map_layer_requirements.description: Fire-access corridor paths for width and vertical-clearance checks.
Building footprint polygons for height, storey, separation, and coverage limits.
Dwelling-unit points/areas for unit-level trigger predicates (e.g. sprinklers).
Front lot-line segments for verified front street-yard setbacks.
Lane edges for verified lane-yard setbacks.
Parcel boundary polygons for lot-level filters and capacity context.
Side lot-line segments for interior and flanking side-yard setbacks.

conditions: distance from lot line abutting a street
